title: PRAGMA integrity_check does not terminate on table with generated column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL, check_value BOOLEAN AS (value IS NOT NULL) STORED);
CREATE TABLE t2 (a INT, b INT NOT NULL AS (IFNULL(a, 0) + 1) STORED);
key_bug_features: PRAGMA integrity_check hangs on generated column table
